name: Squash-Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded Swiss or Gruyere cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes.
2. Cut off a slice at the stem end and scoop out the centers with a spoon; set aside the pulp.
3. Drain the juices from the pulp.
4. Sprinkle the inside of tomato shells with half a teaspoon of salt. Turn upside down on a plate and let stand for 30 minutes, then pat dry.
5. Combine the drained tomato pulp, grated zucchini, onion, cheese, remaining salt, pepper, and basil in a medium bowl. Let stand for 30 minutes.
6. Drain any excess liquid from the mixture and pat dry.
7. Place tomatoes on a baking sheet. Fill each with the zucchini mixture.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, or until the tomatoes are just tender. Serves 4.
